title: How much of the Nerv HQ and Dogma was built
display_title: How much of the Nerv HQ and Dogma was built
wikitext:
[]: How much of the Nerv HQ and Dogma was built?             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Tue Jun 11, 2013 9:20 pm A simple enough question, but hard to answer, at least for me. I've always gotten the impression that the Pyramid and the inverted pyramid next to it where always part of the Black Moon, with Dogma, and in turn Terminal and Central Dogma, being natural parts of the Moon for Lilith, created by the FAR. But maybe I'm completely wrong there. I'm just wondering what the logistics of Adam and Lilith in their Moons were. Was the GeoFront a part of the Moon and they lived on that during their journey through space? Where they in Central Dogma, held in stasis by their Spears? Random questions, I know, but I've never really seen any conclusive answers, although 3.33 may offer some.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jun 16, 2013 10:21 am My impression has always been that Nerv simply built around the existing black moon structure, particularly as they moved into the deeper facilities. The odd structures seen during Ritsuko's tour suggest an original architecture in Terminal Dogma, though it's clear that Nerv have installed doors, bombs, lights, docks, etc in the deep facilities as well. The pyramid and adjacent cooling lake are certainly entirely man-made. We see them under construction in #21'. Likewise, certain locations like the "Antarctica room" outside Lilith's chamber seem to be wholly untouched. Others like the Command center are obviously completely artifical. On this specifically: I'm willing to bet that the entire Eva Cage/Command center supercomplex is constructed in some huge void originally present in the black moon.
